text.div:
Id: IMMZD2DTTBEEncepur
Url: IMMZ.D2.DT.TBE.Encepur
Version: 0.2.0
Title: IMMZ.D2.DT.TBE.Encepur
Status: draft
Type:

system: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/plan-definition-type

code: eca-rule

Date: 2026-03-25 23:30:34+0000
Publisher: WHO
Description:

IMMZ.D2.DT.TBE.Encepur Encepur schedule (In areas where the disease is highly endemic, implying that there is a high individual risk of infection, WHO recommends that vaccination be offered to all age groups, including children)
Knowledge Capability: computable
Related Artifacts:

References

  • WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)
Libraries:
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Actions:
Determine if the client is due for TBE.: Determine if the client is due for TBE vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. Encepur schedule (In areas where the disease is highly endemic, implying that there is a high individual risk of infection, WHO recommends that vaccination be offered to all age groups, including children)
If: Applicability: Client is due for TBE vaccination (Client is due for TBE vaccination)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('draft')
intent: ('proposal')
medication: (Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE20', display: 'TBE vaccines' } }, display: 'TBE vaccines' })
Determine if the client is due for TBE.: Determine if the client is due for TBE vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. If: Applicability: The primary series is complete (The primary series is complete)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR

Dynamic Values:

payload.contentString: (Guidance)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })

extension.valueString: IMMZElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  [Immunization] I
    where I.status = 'completed'
    and I.isSubpotent is not true
IMMZEncounterElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I
    where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
TBE Doses Administered to Patient

/*
@internal: TBE containing Doses Administered to Patient
*/
define "TBE Doses Administered to Patient":
  Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I
  where
    I.vaccineCode in Concepts."TBE vaccines"
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
TBE Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
Number of TBE Primary Series Doses Administered
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
Three TBE primary series doses were administered
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
TBE Booster Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
Number of TBE Booster Series Doses Administered
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
No TBE booster dose was administered
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
Date of Latest TBE Dose
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
The latest TBE dose was administered less than 3 years ago
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
The latest TBE dose was administered more than 3 years ago
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
The primary series is complete
IMMZEncounterElements
Current Patient Age In Years

/** 
 * @dataElement Patient age in years
 */
define "Current Patient Age In Years":
  AgeInYearsAt(Today)
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
Client's age is less than 1 year
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Client is not due for TBE vaccination Case 1
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
One TBE primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
The latest TBE dose was administered less than 1 month ago
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Client is not due for TBE vaccination Case 2
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
Two TBE primary series doses were administered
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
The latest TBE dose was administered less than 9 months ago
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Client is not due for TBE vaccination Case 3
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Client is not due for TBE vaccination
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Client is not due for TBE vaccination Guidance

/*
@output: Client is not due for TBE vaccination Guidance
@guidance = Should not vaccinate client with first TBE dose as client's age is less than 1 year. 
Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first dose.
@guidance = Should not vaccinate client with second TBE dose as the latest dose was administered less than 1 month ago. 
Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the next dose.
@guidance = Should not vaccinate client with third TBE dose as the latest dose was administered less than 9 months ago. 
Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the next dose.
*/
define "Client is not due for TBE vaccination Guidance":
  case
    when "Client is not due for TBE vaccination Case 1" then 'Should not vaccinate client with first TBE dose as client\'s age is less than 1 year. 
Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first dose.'
    when "Client is not due for TBE vaccination Case 2" then 'Should not vaccinate client with second TBE dose as the latest dose was administered less than 1 month ago. 
Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the next dose.'
    when "Client is not due for TBE vaccination Case 3" then 'Should not vaccinate client with third TBE dose as the latest dose was administered less than 9 months ago. 
Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the next dose.'
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
No TBE primary series doses were administered
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
Client's age is more than or equal to 1 year
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Client is due for TBE vaccination Case 1
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
The latest TBE dose was administered more than 1 month ago
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Client is due for TBE vaccination Case 2
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
The latest TBE dose was administered more than 9 months ago
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Client is due for TBE vaccination Case 3
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Client is due for TBE vaccination
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Client is due for TBE vaccination Guidance

/*
@output: Client is due for TBE vaccination Guidance
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with first TBE dose as no TBE doses have been administered and client's age is more than 1 year. 
Check for contraindications.
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with second TBE dose as the latest dose was administered more than 1 month ago. 
Check for contraindications.
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with third TBE dose as the latest dose was administered more than 9 months ago.
Check for contraindications.
*/
define "Client is due for TBE vaccination Guidance":
  case
    when "Client is due for TBE vaccination Case 1" then 'Should vaccinate client with first TBE dose as no TBE doses have been administered and client\'s age is more than 1 year. 
Check for contraindications.'
    when "Client is due for TBE vaccination Case 2" then 'Should vaccinate client with second TBE dose as the latest dose was administered more than 1 month ago. 
Check for contraindications.'
    when "Client is due for TBE vaccination Case 3" then 'Should vaccinate client with third TBE dose as the latest dose was administered more than 9 months ago.
Check for contraindications.'
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
The primary series is complete. Client is not due for TBE booster dose
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
The primary series is complete. Client is not due for TBE booster dose Guidance
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
The primary series is complete Guidance
IMMZD2DTTBEEncounterElements
At least one booster dose was administered
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note Guidance
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Guidance

/*
@dynamicValue: Guidance
*/
define "Guidance":
  case 
    when "Client is not due for TBE vaccination" then "Client is not due for TBE vaccination Guidance"
    when "Client is due for TBE vaccination" then "Client is due for TBE vaccination Guidance"
    when "The primary series is complete. Client is not due for TBE booster dose" then "The primary series is complete. Client is not due for TBE booster dose Guidance"
    when "The primary series is complete" then "The primary series is complete Guidance"
    when "Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note" then "Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note Guidance" 
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTTBEEncepurLogic
Has Guidance

define "Has Guidance":
  "Guidance" is not null and "Guidance" != ''
IMMZCommon
seriesPrimary

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series
 */
define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value string): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToBoolean
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToConcept

define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept):
    if concept is null then
        null
    else
        System.Concept {
            codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C),
            display: concept.text.value
        }
FHIRHelpers
ToCode

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding):
    if coding is null then
        null
    else
        System.Code {
          code: coding.code.value,
          system: coding.system.value,
          version: coding.version.value,
          display: coding.display.value
        }
IMMZCommon
seriesBooster

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the Booster series
 */
define fluent function seriesBooster(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Booster dose' )
WHOCommon
mostRecent

define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  Last(
    immunizations I
      sort by start of occurrence.toInterval()
  )

parameter.name: Client is due for TBE vaccination

name: IMMZD2DTTBEEncepur
title: IMMZ.D2.DT.TBE.Encepur
description:
IMMZ.D2.DT.TBE.Encepur
Encepur schedule
(In areas where the disease is highly endemic, implying that there is a high individual risk of infection, WHO recommends that vaccination be offered to all age groups, including children)

relatedArtifact.citation: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

extension.valueMarkdown:
The vaccines manufactured in Austria and Germany (FSME-Immun and Encepur) can be given from > 1 year of age.
For the conventional vaccination schedule the dose interval is 1–3 months between doses 1 and 2. For Encepur, the 
accelerated schedule requires vaccination on days 0 and 14, followed by a third dose delivered 9–12 months later. 
In addition, Encepur may be used on a rapid schedule, with vaccination on days 0, 7 and 21, followed by a fourth dose delivered 12–18 months later.
For the conventional vaccination schedule, the dose interval is 1–3 months between doses 1 and 2.
For Encepur, the requirement is 9–12 months between doses 2 and 3.

action.title: Determine if the client is due for TBE.
action.description:
Determine if the client is due for TBE vaccine according to the national immunization protocol.
Encepur schedule (In areas where the disease is highly endemic, implying that there is a high 
individual risk of infection, WHO recommends that vaccination be offered to all age groups, including children)

expression.description: Client is due for TBE vaccination
expression.expression: Client is due for TBE vaccination
Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE20', display: 'TBE vaccines' } }, display: 'TBE vaccines' }

extension.valueMarkdown:
Vaccination against the disease requires a primary series of 3 doses; those who will continue to be at risk 
should probably have ≥1 booster doses. For both vaccines (FSME-Immun and Encepur) the manufacturers recommend a booster 
dose to be administered 3 years after completion of the primary series. 
Vaccination against the disease requires a primary series of 3 doses; those who will continue to be at risk should 
probably have ≥1 booster doses. Although there is a strong indication that the spacing of boosters could be expanded 
considerably from the intervals currently recommended by the manufacturers (every 3–5 years), the evidence is still
insufficient for a definitive recommendation on the optimal frequency and number of booster doses.
